splash.body:
Let’s practice building a broadcast media plan!

Your account executive, Elizabeth Swann, forwarded you an email from Hector Barbossa, the buyer. He wants you to build a media plan for his Aruba Tourism campaign.

Look through this document carefully. He has a lot of specific requests for the information he needs from your plan.

You have two goals in this lab:

  1. Build a Slingshot media plan that matches the order details
  2. Use your Pandora media plan to fill out the third party media plan template
Great question. We've created some specific resources to help you with this lab. Let's organize these resources as systems and documents.

Salesforce TOPS Classroom. A sandbox version of Salesforce. You're free to explore, mess things up and get a good feel of Salesforce without screwing up any live orders. You should have an Aruba Tourism opportunity assigned to you in the sandbox.

Slingshot TOPS Classroom. A sandbox version of Slingshot. We use this for media planning, pulling avails and trafficking orders. Show your Slingshot order to your TA during your check-in for feedback.

Client Email. Your account executive forwarded an email from the Home Depot media buyer. This email tells us

  • e client's media plan requirements
  • CPP rates
  • Dayparts
  • GRP rates
  • Triton data needs
  • Demo + Geo Information

Rate Card. Use your channel's rate card to pull avails and check rates for your media plan.

Click the link below to get your lab resources.

Lab Assets

Once you've completed your lab assignment, click the Continue button.
